answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules if a deafened creature is able to cast spells with verbal components. The Divine Word spell description only mentions that a deafened creature is affected by it and suffers the deafened condition for a certain duration. It does not provide any information about the ability of a deafened creature to perform verbal components for casting spells.
